buildings.name: 2009 Building (Church)
buildings.description: Sanctuary, narthex/front lobby, nurseries & children's ministry, choir/music offices.

buildings.name: Fellowship Hall
buildings.description: Fellowship hall, pastors' offices, Explorers/Harvesters/Light classrooms.

buildings.name: 1987 Building (School)
buildings.description: Kitchen/cafeteria, library, computer lab, 1987 sanctuary, K–5th grade classrooms.

buildings.name: Gym / Middle School
buildings.description: Middle-school gym, locker rooms, concession stand, classrooms, Colloquium room.
